creator: vsjcfm@gmail.com
text:
FreeBSD is hang when copiyng files (size between 10MiB and 1GiB) to a large partition (1TiB)

less /var/run/dmesg.boot

options         SC_NORM_ATTR=(FG_LIGHTGREY|BG_BLACK)

options         GEOM_JOURNAL

How-To-Repeat: Simply start copying files to a large partition. FreeBSD hangs after 3-5 minutes, and no kernel panic messages are displayed.
